data.text: P05/05 A FELISIAN WORLD WITH A RING SO TENUOUS AND DULL IT CAN
BARELY BE SEEN CLOSE UP. AT 254.58 IT WAS MOSTLY TALL GRASS WITH
SOME PURPLE BUSHES, A FEW MOUNDS AND A HOPPER BEING ALL THAT WAS
THERE. 241.60 LANDING WAS NEARBY A KIND OF TRENCH IN A GRASSY
FOREST; IT WAS ALMOST LIKE ROLLING GROUND, BUT HAD A RATHER ANGULAR
SURFACE OF SECTIONS, WITH STRANGE DARK LINES ON THE GROUND LIKE
DIVIDERS THAT DISAPPEARED WHEN APPROACHED CLOSELY (FAULT CRACKS?).
SIMILAR LINES WERE FOUND AT 326.40, BUT THE OBJECT OF NOTE WAS WHAT
APPEARED TO BE A PYRAMIDAL OBJECT, BUT CLOSER EXAMINATION REVEALED
TO BE AN ANGULAR SHAPED OUTCROPPING COVERED WITH THE GRASS THAT
COVERS EVERYTHING ELSE. AT 196.22 THERE WERE TOWERING PINNACLES
ABOVE THE ROLLING GRASSLAND WITH BUSHES AND TREES. 339.31 WAS A
BARREN AND VERY COLD PLACE WITH THE LANDING ON A RIDGE WHERE TO ONE
SIDE WAS WHAT APPEARED TO BE A LARGE CRATER OR CREVASSE-LIKE PIT
IS EASILY SEEN, THIS FEATURE HAS A LAKE AT THE BOTTOM; A SEARCH FOR
ANOTHER OBJECT SIGHTED DURING LANDING LED TO A TRIP TO ANOTHER
CRATER-LIKE DEPRESSION NEAR THE SHORELINE AT -64.-28 WITH A SYSTEM
OF ICE PONDS ON ITS BOTTOM; THE ORIGINAL OBJECT SIGHTED WAS A
LARGE ANGULAR LITHIC. PRO 0.267.120 PRV 0.165.617.552 SKINNYMON
